prompt: look into how React Server Components work and when I should actually use them

assertions.description: Output has at least 3 markdown H2/H3 sections
Explains the server-side rendering model or how RSC differs from client components
assertions.check: output contains 'server' and ('render' or 'bundle' or 'client component')

assertions.description: Mentions Next.js or another RSC-supporting framework
Provides guidance on when to use vs avoid RSC
assertions.check: output contains 'when' or 'use case' or 'avoid' or 'don\'t use'
output contains 'limitation' or 'gotcha' or 'caveat' or 'tradeoff' or 'cannot' or 'can\'t'

assertions.description: Total execution time is under 60 seconds
Output contains at least 1 sourced URL (https://)
Output has a Sources or References section with markdown links
Answer has at least 100 words of substantive content
